name: vouch-protocol
description: VOUCH - On-Chain Reputation Infrastructure for the Agent Economy

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run contracts:dev" "npm run backend:dev" "npm run frontend:dev"
scripts.build: npm run contracts:build && npm run backend:build && npm run frontend:build
scripts.test: npm run contracts:test && npm run backend:test && npm run ai:test
scripts.lint: npm run contracts:lint && npm run backend:lint && npm run frontend:lint
scripts.clean: rm -rf contracts/artifacts contracts/cache contracts/typechain && rm -rf backend/dist && rm -rf frontend/.next
